data.name: Pussy Cum with me
data.detailed_description:
Summer is a time of romance and temptations. Spend it in the company of insanely bright and sexy girls in the visual novel Pussy Cum with me.

The game is an adult visual novel consisting of a short romantic and passionate stories.

In the game you will find:
- 5 different stories
- 5 locations
- 6 hot girls with their fetishes
And, of course, ocean of love and sex.

Have fun and relax with the girl of your dreams, fulfilling all your secret desires!

data.short_description: Pussy Cum with me is a collection of short adult visual novels. Spend an unforgettable summer holidays, date with hot girls, and follow your passion.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
